chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D- 92 of 2024 ( Syed Muhammad Ali Shah vs. P.O Sindh and others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.417/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 13-03-2024 Petitioner Syed Muhammad Ali Shah in person >>>>>>..<<<<<< The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for directions against the respondents to stop the salaries of the employees of Union Councils and Town Committees of Taluka Rohri and utilize such funds for the development work of Taluka Rohri. It would be unjustified and in violation of human / fundamental rights to direct the respondents to withheld the salaries of the employees who are putting up hard labour to earn their livelihood and then to utilize the funds for development work of Taluka Rohri at the pleasure of the petitioner. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
